title: Variables & Data Types Coding
description: Coding challenges that require creating variables and performing basic arithmetic.
subject: Programming

content.prompt: Create variables for a student profile: name (string), age (integer), grade (float), and is_enrolled (boolean). Print each variable.
content.starterCode:
# TODO: Create the following variables:
# name - your name as a string
# age - your age as an integer
# grade - your current grade as a float (like 85.5)
# is_enrolled - True if you're enrolled in school

# Create your variables here

# Print each variable
print(f"Name: {name}")
print(f"Age: {age}")
print(f"Grade: {grade}")
print(f"Enrolled: {is_enrolled}")

testCases.expected:
Name: Alice
Age: 16
Grade: 92.5
Enrolled: True

content.prompt: Create a simple calculator that takes two numbers and performs addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
content.starterCode:
# Get two numbers from user
first_number = float(input("Enter first number: "))
second_number = float(input("Enter second number: "))

# TODO: Calculate and display all four operations
# Addition: first_number + second_number
# Subtraction: first_number - second_number
# Multiplication: first_number * second_number
# Division: first_number / second_number

# Your calculations here
